original_statement: which episode had the least number of viewers?
mutated_statement: which segment must be both the least and the most viewed?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Modality/tense change + Quantifier/semantic contradiction + Metric phrasing change: "episode" → "segment" (episode → segment) | "had" (past factual) → "must be" (modal necessity/present) (had → must be) | "least number of viewers" (single comparative) → "both the least and the most viewed" (introduces contradiction/antonym pairing) (least number of viewers → both the least and the most viewed) | "number of viewers" (explicit count) → "viewed" (ambiguous metric) (number of viewers → viewed)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与simple_query的输出可识别关键事实：agent在thought里明确写到“least viewed is 'fbi guy'... and the most viewed is 'welcome to the club'”，并在预测中返回了两项（fbi guy|welcome to the club）。整体行为特征是直接按可行子集（分别找最少和最多）执行查询，未识别或未回应变异问题中“必须同时为最少和最多”的自相矛盾要求，也未提出澄清问题或尝试调和矛盾。因此将其归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
